title: Wave 7 — MCP compatibility and approved execution hardening
goal: Harden execute_approved_action with approval proof verification, unsigned transaction payload validation, retry-safe idempotency ordering, and real devnet local signer submission before expanding upstream MCP compatibility.
scopeDecision: Wave 7a closes Wave 6 approved-action execution deferrals first. Wave 7b handles upstream/mirrored MCP compatibility separately to keep review scope safe.

reviewBudget.suggestedSplit: PR 1: Wave 7a contracts/parsing/proof validation. PR 2: Wave 7a signer submission and idempotency ordering. PR 3: Wave 7b upstream compatibility.

acceptanceCriteria: execute_approved_action requires candidateId, approvalProof, and unsigned VersionedTransaction payload.
execute_approved_action requires proof action_hash and transactionPayload.actionHash to match before signer lookup.
Missing approvalProof or transaction payload returns REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT before signer lookup or idempotency consumption.
verifyActionApproval is called before signer resolution and before idempotency consumption.
Failed proof verification returns DENY and does not call signer methods.
Signer configuration failures do not consume idempotency, allowing retry after configuration is fixed.
Duplicate calls after the execution boundary return DENY with DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION.
LocalKeypairAdapter.signAndSendTransaction no longer returns mock-signature and submits to devnet RPC when enabled.
Mainnet local signer execution remains blocked.
Audit events include redacted proof/signing status and never include raw transaction bytes or secret material.
nonGoals: No broad upstream MCP passthrough in Wave 7a
No allowlisted external mutating tools before approved execution hardening is complete

tasks.title: Add RED tests for execute_approved_action proof and payload input
tasks.description: Add router tests proving missing approvalProof and missing transaction payload return REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT before signer lookup or idempotency consumption.

tasks.title: Add execute approved action input contracts and schema
tasks.description: Define typed execute input and update MCP registry schema with approvalProof and base64 unsigned VersionedTransaction payload.

tasks.title: Add RED tests for proof verification ordering
tasks.description: Prove verifyActionApproval is called before signer lookup and idempotency, and failed proof verification blocks signer methods.

tasks.title: Wire verifyActionApproval into execute handler
tasks.description: Call verifyActionApproval from the execute handler, return proof failure reasons, and record approvalVerified audit metadata.

tasks.title: Add RED tests for real devnet signer submission
tasks.description: Prove LocalKeypairAdapter.signAndSendTransaction does not return mock-signature and submits signed bytes through the Solana connection boundary.

tasks.title: Implement real devnet sign and send
tasks.description: Update LocalKeypairAdapter to sign and submit VersionedTransaction through devnet RPC while preserving mainnet and env guards.

tasks.title: Move idempotency consumption to execution boundary
tasks.description: Consume candidateId only after proof, payload, and signer availability succeed, then deny duplicate submission attempts.

tasks.title: Validate Wave 7a and pause before upstream compatibility
tasks.description: Run focused and full verification before starting Wave 7b.
